capacity_reservation.value: not specified (public terms reference Orders and pricing page; commitment terms negotiated per Order, not published)

data_use_ai_training.value: No explicit AI/model-training language. Provider may use aggregated/anonymized usage data to improve Services; no default retention or ZDR terms; Lambda has no obligation to store/backup customer data
data_use_ai_training.citation: Lambda may use data concerning Customer's or its Users' use of the Services in…

suspension_rights.value: Immediate suspension for breach, excessive utilization, unauthorized access, or legal requirement; also late payment; suspension can be immediate
suspension_rights.citation: Lambda may immediately suspend, throttle or terminate access to the Services if

termination.value: Either party may terminate when no Orders in effect; on termination Lambda may delete Customer Property without obligation to retain; no defined post-termination retrieval window
termination.citation: Lambda may, without obligation to do so... delete the Customer Property in its possession…

unilateral_modification.value: Lambda may update the agreement; updates binding at start of next billing cycle. Website Terms: changes effective 10 days after posting
unilateral_modification.citation: the updated version of this Agreement shall be binding upon the Parties at the…

governing_law_disputes.value: California law; binding arbitration (AAA) yes; class-action waiver yes; court forum N.D. Cal / Santa Clara County if not arbitrated
governing_law_disputes.citation: The Parties agree to arbitrate all claims arising out of this Agreement

liability.value: Cap: fees paid/due in 12 months prior to claim (Website ToU: amount paid). Carveout: indemnification obligations excluded from cap. Consequential/indirect damages waived
liability.citation: EXCEED THE AMOUNTS ACTUALLY PAID BY AND DUE FROM CUSTOMER HEREUNDER DURING THE TWELVE…

output_indemnity.value: No output-specific IP indemnity; Lambda indemnifies for Services infringement generally, excluding claims from Customer Property
output_indemnity.citation: alleging that the use of the Services... infringes any patent, copyright, trademark or trade…

benchmarking_restrictions.value: Prohibited without consent — cannot monitor Services for benchmarking or competitive purposes
benchmarking_restrictions.citation: monitor the Services for any benchmarking or competitive purpose

competitive_training.value: silent on training other models; prohibits building similar/competitive product
competitive_training.citation: for the purpose of building a similar or competitive product or service

capacity_remedies.value: not specified (Services provided AS-IS; no delivery commitment or remedy in public terms)

hardware_substitution.value: not specified in cloud terms (Hardware sale RMA allows similar-version replacement, not GPU delivery substitution)

assignment_financing.value: Lambda may assign to affiliates or in merger/acquisition/asset sale without consent; customer may not assign. No lender step-in/financing language
assignment_financing.citation: Lambda may assign this Agreement in its entirety... in connection with a merger, acquisition

availability_definition.value: no SLA / uptime not committed (Services provided AS-IS, no uptime warranty)

credit_regime.value: No uptime service-credit regime; Lambda offers discretionary credits (coupons/promos) unrelated to SLA, expiring 12 months
credit_regime.citation: Lambda may, at its sole discretion, choose to offer credits for the Services

claim_mechanics.value: not specified (no SLA credit claim process)

sla_exclusions.value: No SLA; but force majeure clause and scheduled/emergency maintenance downtime referenced; beta/preview services excluded from warranties
sla_exclusions.citation: Lambda may temporarily suspend access to the Services during planned downtime for upgrades and…
